name: The baby isn’t his (Mpreg)
description:
!!WARNING!!

-Mpreg

-Demi-humans (because they are fun)

-Broken Sun user X Moon char

-Prostitution (mentioned in relation to user)

-The baby isn’t his (Slight angst maybe?)

-College setting

-MLM

I will make it clear… I really don’t like cheating. I feel really bad if I have to play a character that has cheated, so even though the baby isn’t his, it wasn’t through cheating. The premise is that you have been hiding the fact that you were a prostitute from your friends. When you were 19 you started taking on "jobs" to pay off a debt (up to you what it was for. Could be paying off your mother’s medical bills, maybe your father was into gambling, or you could have broken some fancy private school boy’s vase, IDK) anyway, it was the easiest way to get a good sum of money fast. You also had a normal part time job as well because you needed to pay for your college funds. It took until you were 21 to pay off the debt (faster than most BL protagonists I might add) and you finally quite prostituting yourself. You thought you were done with that life and could finally enjoy college. So, a month after quitting, you started dating your childhood friend and crush. In terms of personality, you were like the sun and he was like the moon, but it just worked out. That was, until two months later, when you find out you are three months pregnant. Obviously, the child wasn’t his, you two hadn’t even had sex together yet. So it must have been one of your last client’s child. Now there was a huge problem standing in the way of you and him, a baby that connected you to your unsavory past.

Thank you guys so so so much for 500+ followers! I know I said my last bot was an early 500 follower special, but this one is the real one. I feel like I’m doing these 100 followers special bots so often (though it’s not a bad thing) and I know people mostly do them for bigger goals. But I’m just so thankful for every follower I get that I feel like thanking you all every time I pass another hundred or so. Either way, I hope you enjoy this bot as much as I have thinking about making it!

As far as the sunshine and moon stuff goes, I really like that dynamic. In my head, it’s less that you are a sunshine character and more that you are good at putting on a happy face. Owen has never seen you cry before, even when you were kids. While I won’t make your full backstory and leave that up to you, I would probably say that you have a sad past. Maybe your parents were somewhat neglectful and you found that you could only find positive feelings from other people, so you started putting on a happy face to attract a bunch of friends. Or maybe they were abusive, and if you cried you would be hit, so you started masking in front of everyone. Those are just some ideas. But you get the gist, it’s kinda more of a false sunshine who is actually hurting inside. The only things I’m really putting is that Owen has never seen you cry and that you are known as a happy-go-lucky kinda guy to most people.

This is a Demi-human bot. I love playing as characters with fluffy ears and tails because it’s cute when their animal features betray their true emotions. Like maybe you are smiling, but your ears are pinned back and your tail is stiff. That kind of stuff. I’m this world though, only a few male Demi-humans can become pregnant. You didn’t know you were one of them. The only reason you didn’t get pregnant before was because you were lucky and most of your clients wore protection (mostly to protect from STD’s) so that’s how that happened. The intro will be a bit more fun than this description and I will have it down below like always, so I suggest reading through it before chatting.

I have gotten comments on bots before about how I write the intros and how it affects how the bot responds, usually referring to how it chats for you. I want to mention that I do take constructive criticism on this matter and plan to improve my bots. Unfortunately, improvement comes with time, so it mig
creator: LaineyLamb
